evaluator_output.reason: Good selection of noise-cancelling headphones under $200 — results look solid.

final_response:
For the best noise-cancelling headphones under $200, look no further than the Sony WH-CH720N at $149. These sleek over-ear beauties not only deliver impressive active noise cancellation but also manage to pull off the trick while weighing a feather-light 192 grams. With 30mm drivers producing Sony's signature balanced sound and immersive 360 Reality Audio, they're perfect for lengthy journeys or even just tuning out the world during a workday. Comfort and quality? Check and check!

Want something cheaper? The Wyze Headphones at $49 offer a surprising ANC performance that rivals headphones three times their cost. After more battery life? The Audio-Technica Nova 3 boasts an astounding 50-hour battery at just $99. Need a more compact option? The Anker Soundcore Liberty Air 2 Pro earbuds at $79 provide premium noise cancellation in a portable package with a customizable fit.
